title: cyclosorus gladiatus
intro: Cyclosorus gladiatus, also known as the 'gladiate lady fern', is a species of fern that belongs to the family Thelypteridaceae. This plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Cyclosorus gladiatus include reducing stress and anxiety, improving digestion, and alleviating symptoms of respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. Cyclosorus gladiatus can be prepared as a herbal tea or decoction, and it is also used in traditional Chinese medicine to treat various health conditions.
